Title: The Killer
Writer: Alexis Nolent, Luc Jacamon, Andrew Kevin Walker
Actors: Michael Fassbender, Tilda Swinton, Charles Parnell
Plot: Solitary, cold, methodical and unencumbered by scruples or regrets, a killer waits in the shadows, watching for his next target. Yet, the longer he waits, the more he thinks he's losing his mind, if not his cool.
